subparts.text: How Python is different from other programming languages when it comes to data analysis? C01
What is the purpose of the __init__ method in a class? C02
What is exception handling? Write a Python program to handle division by zero exception. C03
What are the different file handling modes in Python? Provide a code to demonstrate reading a file. C04
Write a Python program that takes user input for two numbers and performs division. Handle the ZeroDivisionError exception properly. C01
Create a Python module named my_module.py that contains a function to calculate the area of a circle. Then, demonstrate how to import and use this module in another Python script. C02

Write a Python program to implement a class ⁠ Student ⁠ with attributes ⁠ name ⁠, ⁠ roll_no ⁠, and ⁠ marks ⁠. Add a method ⁠ calculate_grade ⁠ that returns the grade based on the following criteria: •⁠ ⁠Marks >= 95: Grade A •⁠ ⁠Marks >= 85: Grade B •⁠ ⁠Marks >= 75: Grade C •⁠ ⁠Marks < 65: Grade D C03
Explain the steps involved in the Data Analysis process. How does data pre-processing play a crucial role in this process? C01
What is Exploratory Data Analysis and why is it important? Demonstrate some EDA techniques using Python. C02
Write Python code using the pandas library to read a CSV file named "data.csv" . Calculate and print the number of rows and columns in the DataFrame. Also, print the data type of each column. C03
